statuses.label: Paranoia
statuses.description: They hear threats everywhere and start making bad choices.

effects.message: {user} keeps hearing footsteps that are not there and wastes precious time.
{user} gives in to paranoia and attacks {target} first.

statuses.label: Exhaustion
statuses.description: They are drained and can barely keep moving.

effects.message: {user} stumbles around in a haze, barely keeping up.
{user} collapses from exhaustion and never gets back up.

statuses.label: Adrenaline
statuses.description: A dangerous burst of energy makes them faster and more aggressive.

effects.message: {user} rides a rush of adrenaline and pushes through the pain.

statuses.description: They become horny, what more can I say

{user} gets horny and fucks {target} with a spear, killing them in the process...

statuses.label: Kitten

effects.message: {user} slips into kitten mode and loses focus on the arena.
